---
title: "Teaching"
---

### 2024

- **Numerical analysis for engineers (lecture, 70h ETD).** 1st year of Engineering bachelor (100-110 students).  
  Winter semester, Université Laval, Québec, CA.

### 2018

- **Mathematics for engineers (exercises, 30h ETD).** 1st year of Engineering bachelor (50-60 students).
  Autumn semester, University of Luxembourg, Luxembourg, LUX.

### 2015

- **Linear ODEs (lecture & exercises, 19h ETD).** 1st year of Biology bachelor (25-35 students).
  2nd Half of Autumn semester, Université de Franche-Comté, Besançon, FR.

### 2014

- **Linear ODEs (exercises, 17h ETD).** 1st year of Biology bachelor (25-35 students).
  2nd Half of Autumn semester, Université de Franche-Comté, Besançon, FR.
